back_translation: And I saw another sign in heaven, great and marvelous, namely seven angels holding seven last plagues, because in these plagues the wrath of God will be completed in full

And I saw something that looked like a sea of glass mixed with fire. And I saw those who had conquered the wild-beast, those who had conquered the image of it, and those who had conquered the number of the name of it, standing on the sea of glass, holding the harps of God

And they sang the song of Moses the servant of God, and the song of the Lamb, saying, ‘Great and marvelous are Your works, O Lord God, the One who possesses supreme authority. Your ways are righteous and true, O King of all the ages

Who, then, will not fear You, O Lord, and not give honor to Your name? Because You alone are holy. All the nations will come and bow down before Your face, because Your righteous works have been revealed.’
After these events, I looked, and the temple of the tabernacle of testimony in heaven was opened
And the seven angels who held the seven plagues came out from the temple, dressed in clean and bright linen cloth, and girded with golden sashes around their chests
And one of the four living-creatures handed seven golden bowls full of the wrath of God, who lives forever and ever, to the seven angels
And the temple was filled with smoke from the glory of God and from His power. And no one could enter that temple until the seven plagues of the seven angels would be completed in full
